name: Rice with Garlic and Pine Nuts
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat the butter in a wide skillet over medium heat.
2. Once melted, swirl in the garlic puree.
3. Add the rice and pine nuts to the skillet.
4. Stir the mixture until the rice is heated through and has absorbed the butter.
5. Season with salt and freshly ground pepper to taste.
6. Serve hot.
